atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder and elbow pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constant left shoulder and elbow pain for approximately five months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is often severe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by weight-bearing activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has been maintaining a two-day-per-week weightlifting routine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain makes it difficult to lift more than 15-20 pounds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has stopped exercising due to the pain over the past two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he continues to walk approximately 30 minutes daily with his wife.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds left shoulder and elbow tenderness to palpation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds positive Hawkins-Kennedy test.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds positive Neer's test.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds normal proximal upper extremity strength.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds normal distal upper extremity strength.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a referral to Dr. Martha Rivera for physical therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends ice and rest

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans follow-up if symptoms worsen or do not improve
